name: Ovulation Cycle & Fertility Window Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to estimate ovulation date, fertile window, and cycle variability based on menstrual cycle data. Applies statistical process control (SPC) and lean principles to cycle tracking.

inputs.label: Average cycle length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlıklı yetişkin kadınlar için tipik aralık; yumurtlama tahmini için temel alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typischer Bereich für gesunde erwachsene Frauen; als Basis für die Eisprungschätzung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Plage typique pour les femmes adultes en bonne santé ; utilisée comme référence pour l'estimation de l'ovulation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rango típico para mujeres adultas sanas; se usa como referencia para la estimación de ovulación.

inputs.label: Luteal phase length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit yumurtlama sonrası faz; varyasyon olası luteal faz defektini gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Phase nach dem Eisprung; Abweichung deutet auf möglichen Lutealphasendefekt hin.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Phase post-ovulation fixe ; une variation indique un possible défaut de phase lutéale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fase post-ovulación fija; la variación indica posible defecto de fase lútea.

inputs.label: Start date of last menstrual period
inputs.businessContext: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

label_i18n.en: Start date of last menstrual period
label_i18n.fr: Date de début des dernières règles
label_i18n.es: Fecha de inicio del último período menstrual

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir sonraki yumurtlama ve doğurgan pencereyi hesaplamak için referans noktası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Referenzpunkt für die Berechnung des nächsten Eisprungs und des fruchtbaren Fensters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Point de référence pour calculer la prochaine ovulation et la fenêtre fertile.
businessContext_i18n.es: Punto de referencia para calcular la próxima ovulación y ventana fértil.

inputs.label: Cycle length variability (standard deviation, days)
inputs.businessContext: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

label_i18n.fr: Variabilité de la durée du cycle (écart-type, jours)
label_i18n.es: Variabilidad de la duración del ciclo (desviación estándar, días)

businessContext_i18n.en: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SPC kurallarına göre güven aralıklarını hesaplamak ve doğurgan pencere genişliğini ayarlamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wird verwendet, um Konfidenzintervalle zu berechnen und die Breite des fruchtbaren Fensters gemäß SPC-Regeln anzupassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utilisé pour calculer les intervalles de confiance et ajuster la largeur de la fenêtre fertile selon les règles du contrôle statistique des procédés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Se utiliza para calcular intervalos de confianza y ajustar el ancho de la ventana fértil según reglas de SPC.

inputs.label: Age group
inputs.businessContext: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş, döngü düzenliliğini ve doğurganlığı etkiler; risk ayarlaması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter beeinflusst Zyklusregelmäßigkeit und Fruchtbarkeit; wird zur Risikoanpassung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'âge affecte la régularité du cycle et la fertilité ; utilisé pour l'ajustement du risque.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad afecta la regularidad del ciclo y la fertilidad; se usa para ajuste de riesgo.

inputs.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 days)
inputs.businessContext: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif hesaplama yöntemini tetikler ve tıbbi danışma için uyarı verir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Löst alternative Berechnungsmethode aus und warnt vor ärztlicher Konsultation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déclenche une méthode de calcul alternative et des alertes pour consultation médicale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Activa método de cálculo alternativo y alerta para consulta médica.

rules.message: Cycle length must be between 20 and 45 days.
Luteal phase length must be between 10 and 16 days.
High variability detected; consider setting 'Irregular cycles' to true.
Short luteal phase in age >40 may indicate diminished ovarian reserve.

thresholds.message: Fertile window extends beyond cycle boundaries; check inputs.
High cycle variability reduces ovulation prediction confidence; consider additional tracking methods.
Luteal phase < 11 days may indicate luteal phase defect; consult healthcare provider.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
